ref: The crowd joined in the attack on Paul and Silas. Then the officials tore the clothes off the two men and ordered them to be beaten with a whip.
text: Ban…Ē…õza tapl…õn…Ē al…õ n…õ kititiŐÄ l…Ēl…Ē …õl…õ n…õ Paulo n…õŐÄ sila shu, k…õl…õ bebhukulu…Ē ak…Ē …Ēsha …Ēs…õ bebuŐĀ b…Ēd…ĒŐÉ kp…õkp…õ n…õ bal…õishu t…õ behuisi al…õ.

Or why do we say that the people, along with the chief, are hearing, so that the praying assembly fills our mouths together to speak truthfully in prayer?‚ÄĚ

translated: People say the forest is extremely dry, there is no water, not even the small leaves in the forest remain, so the animals are perishing from hunger, and the birds are flying away.

ref: But you have surely seen and heard how this man Paul is upsetting a lot of people, not only in Ephesus, but almost everywhere in Asia. He claims that the gods we humans make are not really gods at all.
text: K…õl…õ n…Ēm…ĒŐÄ p…õ n…ĒoluŐÉ kana g…õ Paulo any…õ al…õ etsyina banun…Ē ekpe…Ėekpe…Ėe…õ m…õ, p…õ agbana ban…ĒkpekpeŐÄ…õ atsa…Ėak…õ idzo n…õ Efoso…Ē n…õŐÄ Asia b…Ēd…ĒŐÉ m…õ petee tsy…õ. A…Ė…Ē as…õ ibudi…õ g…õ ban…Ēdzyrame…õ abh…õt…õ tinu akaa nanaŐÄ.
translated: People say that not only Paulo but also those who live in the market are cheating me repeatedly, that thieves also take away all my things from Efoso and Asia completely. May they see the truth from the lies of those who speak falsely through their actions.

ref: You must tell everyone what you have seen and heard.
text: W…ĒbodziŐÄ an…Ē g…õ …Ēb…Ē…Ė…Ēa…Ė…Ē …Ēdal…õ y…õishu …Ēk…Ē banun…Ē petee n…õ k…õg…õ …Ēm…Ē p…õ oluŐÉ…Ē shu.
translated: The people say that the market path goes to the chief, and the ram's horn is in the village where the people tell all of them.

ref: My friends, I want you to know that I have often planned to come for a visit. But something has always kept me from doing it. I want to win followers to Christ in Rome, as I have done in many other places.
text: M…õel…õ al…õ m…Ē, …õp…õ s…õ t…õ k…õzaŐÉ tititiŐÄ m…õ k…Ē …Ēn…Ē …Ēs…õ an…õ obo m…õt…Ē…Ė…Ē w…Ēn…Ē …Ēk…Ē t…õbaba ibui flogo t…õ m…õm…Ē …õdzo t…õ m…õibu at…Ēwui n…õ …Ēn…Ē m…õ, as…õ ibu g…õ itibu at…Ēwui teli g…õ letinu Yudan…õ n…õ …õk…Ē tili ana.
translated: My people have said that we should come daily with my food and my labor efforts, they make it with fire and their flames; let me hear the word and let me see the sign in my hand. However, they have given those signs to tell about Yudan…õ with a clear voice.

ref: I am bound by these chains because of what we people of Israel hope for. This is why I have called you here to talk about this hope of ours.

translated: Now people are saying that this market we come to, along with the town and your house, belong to the chief.
